assignments.description: In order to use the same variable in the next screens and actions.
assignments.name: Assign_The_Inactive_User_to_Var
assignments.label: Assign The Inactive User to Var

assignments.name: Update_Show_Validation_on_Inactive_User
assignments.label: Update Show Validation on Inactive User

Flow.description: 2025-02-23: added Role Type field on Create (MIS-8472) 2024-12-10: Add Roles and Hierarchy support 2024-03-20: support Update 2024-03-18: added Package Licenses 2023-05-08 Removed business applications
Flow.label: User Management Screen Flow

recordCreates.name: Create_Manage_Users_Log_Role_Update
recordCreates.label: Create Manage Users Log - Role Update

recordLookups.description: For checking the number of free licenses
recordLookups.name: Get_Salesforce_User_License
recordLookups.label: Get Salesforce User License

recordLookups.name: Search_for_Open_Manage_Users_Log_Record
recordLookups.label: Search for Open Manage Users Log Record

fields.name: Deactivate_Successfully_Display_Text
fields.fieldText:
✅ The request for deactivating {!Selected_User_To_Deactivate.recordName} has been created successfully ✅


Deactivate Time: {!Deactivate_Date} by the end of the day, as per Israeli time.


  • For any changes please update the relevant Manage Users Log Record.

fields.name: Open_Log_Validation_Display_Text
fields.fieldText:
There is an open request for {!Selected_User_To_Deactivate.recordName}.

Please update the Open request or select a different user.﻿

validationRule.errorMessage: The Deactivate Date field should contain either Today's date or a date in the future.

fields.name: Username_taken
fields.fieldText:
We found an existing user with the same username: {!Find_User_with_the_Username.FirstName} {!Find_User_with_the_Username.LastName}.

This isn’t supported in the flow, so please reach out to MIS and request to update & activate the existing user.

fields.name: Current_Role_Data
fields.fieldText:
Selected Role:

{!Get_Existing_Role_Update.Name}

Currently under Role:

{!Get_Existing_Parent_Role_Update.Name}


Pick a new Role for this Hierarchy:

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Username_taken
fields.fieldText: Please complete the First Name and Last Name fields.

fields.name: Channel_Manager_Text
fields.fieldText: Channel Manager: {!Get_Existing_User_Create.Channel_Manager__r.FirstName} {!Get_Existing_User_Create.Channel_Manager__r.LastName}

fields.name: Clone_Header
fields.fieldText: Available Licenses: {!Available_Licenses_Formula}

fields.name: No_available_license_text
fields.fieldText:
No license is available.

To create a new user, you must deactivate another user first.

value.stringValue: Select Existing User to Clone from

fields.name: Provide_Email_Inactive_User_Checkbox
fields.fieldText: If there is no Active User to clone from, please enter Email of Inactive User

fields.name: Not_Found_Inactive_User_Display_Text
fields.fieldText:
Not found a user with the email address: {!Email_of_Deactivated_User.value}

Please enter a different Email address or select an Active User.

screens.name: Start_Screen
screens.label: Start Screen

fields.name: Manage_Users_Icon_Display_Text
fields.fieldText:
Manage Users and Role Hierarchy

Create | Update | Deactivate

screens.helpText: Create a new request for Create/Update/Deactivate User

fields.name: Success_Message
fields.fieldText:
Your request has been created successfully ✅

Manage Users Log Record


Please note that this request requires authorization from someone who has the relevant permissions.


Once the request is approved, a new user will be created and the Manage Users Log Record will be updated to 'Completed' with a lookup to the new user.


Best Regards.

fields.name: Channel_Manager_Text_update
fields.fieldText: Channel Manager: {!Get_Existing_User_Update.Channel_Manager__r.FirstName} {!Get_Existing_User_Update.Channel_Manager__r.LastName}

value.stringValue: Needs to be the same as
